rationale: Codebase-pin lens. All three of my round-1 concrete_changes_required are ADDRESSED. plugins/mindspec/README.md now shows the flat layout: the '## Disk layout' block renders '.mindspec/specs/<spec-id>/' with co-located 'reviews/' (annotated 'spec 106 / ADR-0039'), and the line-75 panel.json reference points at '<spec-dir>/reviews/<panel>/'. Grep over README for '.mindspec/docs/specs|review/' is now EMPTY. plugins/mindspec/FINDINGS.md items 3 and 8 are repointed from '<repo>/review/prep/...' and 'review/<panel>/' to '<spec-dir>/reviews/...'; the one surviving 'review/' grep hit (line 99) is 'final-review/SKILL.md', a skill name not a panel-artifact path — correctly out of scope. The AC17 breadth grep (now INCLUDING the 2 files, plus the rest of plugins/.claude/.agents/internal/setup/internal/bootstrap) shows ZERO live pre-flatten path: every residual hit is a frozen historical_skills/*.md snapshot, a test comment, or bootstrap_test.go's negative-assertion list (asserting the canonical path must NOT be created). plugins/.claude/.agents are FULLY CLEAN. Prose stays accurate to the flat framework. Round-1 work undisturbed; build/vet OK; ownership/doctor/validate suites green. No new issue.

findings.issue: Round-1 blocker resolved: '## Disk layout' block + line 75 now show flat '.mindspec/specs/<spec-id>/' with co-located 'reviews/'; grep for '.mindspec/docs/specs|review/' over README is empty. Description is accurate to the flat layout.

Round-1 minor resolved: items 3 and 8 repointed to '<spec-dir>/reviews/prep/...' and '<spec-dir>/reviews/<panel>/...'. Only residual 'review/' match is 'final-review/SKILL.md' (a skill name, not a panel-artifact path), legitimately out of scope.

Full grep across plugins/.claude/.agents/internal/setup/internal/bootstrap for '.mindspec/docs/' and repo-root 'review/<panel|prep|...>' shows zero LIVE pre-flatten paths. All hits are intentionally-frozen historical_skills snapshots, test comments, or bootstrap_test.go's negative-assertion list (proving the canonical path is not created). plugins/.claude/.agents fully clean. Round-1 cleanup undisturbed; build/vet OK; ownership/doctor/validate green.
